title: Origins: Zamjenik
description: A origin that lets you swap your position with other entities.
body:
**Zamjenik (Zams)** 🟣  `1.20.1+ Impact: 🟠🟠`
> Corrupted Enderians with fractured connection to space. You don't chase prey — you rearrange the battlefield.

👁️ **Swap**
> Using Primary you can switch positions with another entity at the cost of your hunger.
> ℹ️ `Most forms of teleportation are disabled for you.`

🌑 **Displacement Swap**
> Using Secondary you can switch two entities positions with each other.
> ℹ️ `There are two ways you can do this:
  > Selecting a entity that is within 20 blocks of you and swaping them with another that is within 20 blocks. 
  > While sneaking you can swap two entities that are 10 blocks close to you.`

🧪 **Cursed Composition**
> Your corrupt biology makes it so you are immune to certain potion effects but also partially undead.
> ℹ️ `You are immune to; Levitation, Regeneration and Poison`

🖇 **Slender Body**
> You can reach things further away from you.

💦 **Hydrosensitivity**
> Your body burns while in contact with water.

🧲 **Magnetic repulsion**
> Irons unique magnetic properties interfere with your abilities making you unable to swap entities holding them.

🍬 **Scared of Gourds**
> You are afraid of pumpkins. For a good reason.
